'''Abano''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aruzan/Legends|Aruzan]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]], where he worked as a [[dola tree]] farmer. He was the father of [[Manaroo/Legends|Manaroo]], a tattooed dancing girl who eventually married the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]].

==Biography==
When Manaroo was captured for processing by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces, Abano begged for his daughter's life to [[Sinick Kritkeen]], but the Imperial dismissed Abano with false promises and threats. After Manaroo met Dengar, the bounty hunter came to Aruza and rescued Abano and his family. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] hid Abano's and many other Aruzan families on an undisclosed safeworld.
